name: adaptive-ui-engineer
description: Explicit S and N workflows for resilient responsive web interfaces.

interface.shortDescription: Choose explicit standard or enhanced responsive UI workflows.
interface.longDescription: Use Adaptive-UI-S for standard responsive UI work, or Adaptive-UI-N for implementation with a required scoped post-change style audit.
defaultPrompt: Use $adaptive-ui-s for a focused responsive UI audit or scoped refactor.
Use $adaptive-ui-n to implement this UI change and complete its required post-change style audit.
